newSearch.title: New Search
newSearch.subtitle: Configure your candidate search parameters. AI will handle the rest.
newSearch.nlPlaceholder: Describe your search in natural language... E.g.: 'Looking for 10 SDRs for SaaS in Chile with Salesforce and cold calling'
newSearch.nlPowered: Powered by Groq + Llama 3.3 — AI will fill in all fields automatically

form.habilidadesPlaceholder: E.g.: Salesforce, cold calling, B2B SaaS...
form.umbralDescription: Only candidates with a screening score equal to or above this value will be contacted. An email will be sent automatically requesting their CV.
form.coldEmailDescription: A personalized email will be sent to candidates with a score >= {{threshold}} requesting their CV
form.variablesDesc: {nombre} — Candidate name · {puesto} — Position sought · {empresa} — Candidate's company · {remitente} — Your name

jobDescription.title: Job description
jobDescription.placeholder: Select a role and industry, then click "Generate with AI"

interviewProcess.description: Define the interview process stages. You can configure who participates in each stage and which competencies are evaluated.
interviewProcess.questionsDesc: Generate the questions the AI avatar will ask in the initial screening interview. They will be sent directly to n8n.
interviewProcess.questionsPlaceholder: Add questions manually, paste bulk text, or generate with AI
interviewProcess.questionsEditHint: They will be sent to the AI avatar when the search is launched.
interviewProcess.manualPlaceholder: Type a question and press Enter or click +
interviewProcess.bulkPlaceholder:
Paste your questions here (one per line or numbered):
1. Tell us about your experience...
2. How do you handle pressure...
3. Describe a recent achievement...

summary.description: Review your search parameters before launching. The AI will find candidates, evaluate them and enrich their profiles automatically.
summary.paso1: Search {{count}} candidates in Apollo matching your profile
summary.paso2: Enrich each profile with Google (LinkedIn, experience, skills)
summary.paso3: Evaluate and score candidates with AI (Groq)
summary.paso4: Send cold email to candidates with score >= {{threshold}}

defaultEmail.intro: My name is {remitente} and I work in the talent team at UMINE.
defaultEmail.body: We are looking for a {puesto} and your profile caught our attention. We would love to learn more about your experience.
defaultEmail.request: If you are interested in exploring this opportunity, we would appreciate it if you could share your updated CV by replying to this email.
defaultEmail.closing: Looking forward to hearing from you.

busquedas.title: Searches
busquedas.subtitle: Manage your active and completed candidate searches

pipeline.noResults: No candidates found matching those filters.

notifications.errorInterpretar: Could not interpret the search. Try being more specific.
notifications.errorIA: Error processing with AI. Check your Groq API key.
notifications.ingresaPuestoIndustria: Enter the role and industry first
notifications.errorTest: Test error — verify that n8n is published
notifications.completaPuestoIndustria: Complete at least the role and industry
notifications.busquedaDemo: Search in demo mode — redirecting to pipeline...
